name: Region Syddanmark (Region of Southern Denmark)

colors.symbolism: the white field of the regional logo

description: A white field charged at the centre with the Region Syddanmark logotype: a green graphic mark beside grey lettering reading 'Region Syddanmark'.
history: Region Syddanmark was established on 1 January 2007 by the Danish Local Government Reform (Strukturreformen). The flag carries the region's corporate identity.

features.symbolism: the official wordmark of Region Syddanmark (the Region of Southern Denmark), one of the five regions established in the 2007 local-government reform
